description:
A detective investigating a premeditated fraud case needs to prove the suspect actively researched their methodology and downloaded suspicious tools. Using the suspect's Chrome profile located at /home/ga/evidence/Chrome_Profile/, create a forensic case named 'DarkWeb_Investigation_2024' with case number 'INV-WEB-001'. Identify all web search queries and web downloads from the provided data source. 

Generate a pipe-delimited report of all identified search queries to /home/ga/Reports/web_searches.txt using the header:
SEARCH_TERM|DATE_ACCESSED|DOMAIN

Generate a pipe-delimited report of all identified downloads to /home/ga/Reports/web_downloads.txt using the header:
FILENAME|URL|DATE_DOWNLOADED

Finally, write a summary to /home/ga/Reports/browser_summary.txt containing the total number of searches and downloads in the following format:
TOTAL_SEARCHES: <N>
TOTAL_DOWNLOADS: <N>
